analysis_result: At 120 hours, parental HSC1λ-gGFP cells had a mean Trypan blue cell count of 223,333 ± 10,488 (mean ± SD, n = 3 biologically independent experiments). More precisely: mean = 223333.3333, SD = 10488.08848.
denominator_used: N = 3 biologically independent experiments (triplicate measurements) from MOESM10 'Fig 5b' sheet at time 120 hours for the HSC1λ-gGFP condition.
assumptions_made: The MOESM10 'Fig 5b' source data sheet provides pre-summarized Mean, SD, and N (not raw triplicate values), so the reported values are used directly as summary statistics; 'Trypan blue cell count' refers to the viable/total cell counts tabulated in this sheet; the gGFP condition labeled 'HSC1λ-gGFP' represents the parental HSC1λ line with a control (GFP) sgRNA.
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - File: 41467_2023_38432_MOESM10_ESM.xlsx
   - Sheet: 'Fig 5b' (dimensions A1:G8)
   - Columns (row 1-2 headers): Time (Hrs) | HSC1λ-gGFP (Mean, SD, N) | HSC1λ-gPTCH1 (Mean, SD, N)
   - Rows contain time course data at 0, 24, 48, 72, 96, 120 hours with n = 3 at each time point.

B. COHORT DEFINITION
   - Selected row: Time (Hrs) = 120
   - Selected condition: HSC1λ-gGFP (parental HSC1λ cells; columns B, C, D)

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - Outcome: Trypan blue cell count (number of viable cells as enumerated by Trypan blue exclusion)
   - At Time = 120 hours, HSC1λ-gGFP columns:
        Mean = 223333.3333
        SD   = 10488.08848
        N    = 3

D. COMPUTATION
   - The sheet reports pre-summarized descriptive statistics; no further aggregation was required.
   - Retrieved values directly from the '120' row, 'HSC1λ-gGFP' block.

E. RESULT
   - Mean ± SD = 223,333 ± 10,488 cells (n = 3)
   - Exact values: 223333.3333 ± 10488.08848

F. CAVEATS
   - Only summary statistics (mean, SD, N) were available in MOESM10 Fig 5b; individual triplicate raw values were not provided in this sheet, so the mean and SD are taken as reported by the authors.
   - 'Parental HSC1λ (HSC1λ-gGFP)' is interpreted as the line expressing a control GFP sgRNA (i.e., PTCH1 wild-type parental context), consistent with the sheet header labels.
